nasb.text: Then the drink offering with it shall be a fourth of a hin for each lamb, in the holy place you shall pour out a drink offering of strong drink to the Lord.

esv.text: Its drink offering shall be a quarter of a hin for each lamb. In the Holy Place you shall pour out a drink offering of strong drink to the Lord.

cnv.text: 為每隻公羊羔，要同獻一公升作奠祭的酒；你要在聖所中把醇酒獻給耶和華作奠祭。

ccb.text: 与每只羊羔一同献上的还有一升酒，要将酒洒在圣所作为献给耶和华的奠祭。
